games.name: Hit And Run: Solo Leveling
games.description: In Hit And Run: Solo Leveling, you turn into a brave adventurer who leveling your way through levels filled with traps and obstacles. This arcade game combines parkour and adventure for a thrilling yet casual experience.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Dye It Right: Color Picker
games.description: Welcome to the wonderful world of Dye It Right: Color Picker, where creativity meets fun! In this casual puzzle game, you&amp;rsquo;ll begin a colorful journey. This game is filled with exciting challenges designed for kids and the young at heart.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Baby Noob vs Baby Obby Horse
games.description: Two baby siblings need to find a key and a chest in the forest. Help the baby siblings find the key and, after finding it, open the chest with the key. There are terrifying animals in the forest, so you must be very careful. To defeat the animals in the forest, you should throw bottles. The bottle is a very powerful weapon, so dont hesitate to use it. Collect the lollipops in the forest. The babies love lollipops, so dont forget to collect them.
games.instructions: Use the WASD and arrow keys to move Press the P key to throw the bottle There are 12 different challenging levels Double jump is enabled

games.name: Lucy All Season Fashioninsta
games.description: In Lucy All Season Fashionista, players embark on a vibrant fashion journey with Lucy, navigating through different seasonal trends. The game provides an array of outfits, hairstyles, and accessories specific to each season. Players get to mix and match pieces of clothing, create unique looks, and customize Lucys hair to reflect the chosen outfits.
games.instructions: Touch Pad or Mouse click Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Last War Survival
games.description: The end is near. The world is no longer peaceful. In this game full of gunfights, zombies, and strategic challenges, youll battle the evil zombies. Solving number puzzles to unleash your tactical genius. In Last War Survival, youll play as a survivor in a world ravaged by a zombie virus.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Mosquito Bite 3d
games.description: Play the role of a buzzing mosquito and start a fun simulator. Flying through various environments to find your target and attack her. Your goal is to find the best moment to sneak up on your target and bite her. Your tasks such as attacking a humans head or legs. But be careful, your target might swat at you at any time.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Animal Puzzle Kids
games.description: Welcome to our exciting jigsaw puzzle game where you have the opportunity to create a variety of animals by putting them together from pieces! This game is perfect for anyone who loves puzzles and animals.
games.instructions: Touch Pad or Mouse click Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Among Golden Run 3D
games.description: Among Golden Run 3D is a thrilling parkour runner featuring familiar characters. Dash through obstacles in a fast-paced race for survival. Collect coins and power-ups to improve your speed. Enjoy 3D graphics with smooth animations. Test your reflexes with dynamic gameplay. Avoid traps and reach the longest distance possible. Compete with friends for the highest score. Simple one-touch controls make it easy to play but challenging to master. Play online anytime for endless fun. Can you run the farthest without getting caught?
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Who am I Guess Who
games.description: Enjoy one of the most known board games. Discover and guess characters, questions and answers game, very fun to play with friends and family, and specially dedicated to children. Funniest guessing game.
games.instructions: Touch Pad or Mouse click Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Ticktock Egg Run
games.description: TickTock Egg Run is an exciting adventure game where you help a brave little egg through obstacles while avoiding monsters. In adventure mode, you control a cute little egg on a thrilling journey through various levels.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Sprunki Team
games.description: All the Sprunki timin want to escape from the forest. There is a mysterious monster in the forest that scares everyone. Time is running out. Escape before time runs out and stay safe. Reach the blue door. Collect the gold and green money. Dont forget anything and never look back. Escape with your friend, dont stop.
games.instructions: Use WASD Keys to move and jump First collect the gold coin and then collect the green coin Both mobile and desktop playability

games.name: Doto
games.description: Tap the screen to move the yellow dot and Try not to collide with other dots. You need to be calm about every click.Because if you are not careful.all your efforts will be wasted!
games.instructions: Tap the screen

games.name: Candy Pop Challenge
games.description: Candy Pop Challenge is an exciting and free-to-play online game that brings fun to players of all ages. Whether you are a kid or an adult this game offers a delightful challenge filled with colorful candies and satisfying popping mechanics.The goal is simple yet engaging&amp;mdash;pop as many candies as required to clear each level. The challenge increases as you progress making every round more exciting and rewarding. Use your skills and strategy to complete the levels.
games.instructions: Mouse to play

games.name: Dora Match3
games.description: Dora Match3 is a colorful puzzle adventure featuring your favorite explorer. Match gems, fruits, and other fun items to complete levels. Use boosters and power-ups to clear tricky puzzles. Enjoy vibrant graphics and fun sound effects inspired by Dora&amp;rsquo;s adventures. Challenge yourself with increasing difficulty and exciting new challenges. A great game for kids and fans of match-3 puzzles. Play at your own pace and improve problem-solving skills. Easy to learn but offers engaging challenges. Play online without downloads. Explore the world of Dora while solving puzzles!
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Titans Defense Run
games.description: Get ready for an epic adventure in Titans Defense Run! This exciting arcade game combines parkour and strategic attacks into one high-energy experience. Keep running through challenging levels and collect more bombs. Give them to your helper and shoot the monsters.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Mr Hacker The Museum Hunt
games.description: Join the thrilling heist in &amp;lsquo;Mr Hacker: The Museum Hunt.&amp;rsquo; As a hired hacker, your mission is to crack 150 vaults in a high-stakes museum break-in. Unleash your skills, avoid security, and uncover precious diamonds. Are you up for the challenge? Play now and immerse yourself in the world of cunning schemes and high-tech heists.
games.instructions: Left Mouse Button Click

games.name: Sprunki 2Players Billiard
games.description: Sprunki Billiard is a fun and exciting game with a twist. Aim and shoot to pocket balls. Enjoy smooth physics and realistic ball movement. Compete challenge friends online. Improve your billiard skills with precise aiming. Play in different table designs and unique themes. Play anytime and test your strategic shots. Can you become the best Sprunki billiard player?
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Bridge Race Wedding Master
games.description: Bridge Race Wedding Master is a lively, romance-filled parkour game where you run to build the wedding bridge! In this unique adventure, you can play as a bride or groom. Collect flowers,cakes, red envelopes, etc., and build a platform leading to the wedding hall. Keep running and collect suits, skirts, keys, rings, etc.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Tower Clash Collect Bricks
games.description: Welcome to Tower Clash: Collect Bricks! In this exciting tower defense game, you&amp;rsquo;ll be tasked with building and upgrading defensive towers while collecting bricks to strengthen your defenses. Your goal is to build a strong defensive tower and a shell to shoot the opposing tower. Collect lots of blue bricks to build.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: CluckNRun
games.description: Embark on a thrilling journey through the countryside in ClucknRun, where your mission is to return a lost chickens to their farm home! Navigate through vibrant farm landscapes, collecting bountiful chickens and essential gasoline along the way. But be cautious&amp;mdash;barrels are scattered across the path, ready to derail your ride!
games.instructions: Use the A and D keys for smooth left and right movement or simply control the flow with your mouse for an effortless experience

games.name: Knife Master Hit
games.description: Knife Master Hit - Throw On Target is best challenge game. Throw the knife on rotating fruit without touching other knife, if you touch on the other knife level will be failed. If you hit all the knives without touching other knives then the level will be completed.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Roll Classic
games.description: Roll Classic is a timeless dice game that combines strategy and luck. Players take turns rolling dice to collect points, aiming to reach a target score before their opponents. With each roll, players must decide whether to risk it all for more points or hold back to secure their lead. The game offers thrilling twists, where the unexpected can change the course of the game. Quick to learn, yet endlessly engaging, Roll Classic is perfect for family and friends.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Connect the Balls 2
games.description: In the second part of the new online game Connect the Balls 2 you will continue to play through an interesting puzzle. In front of you on the screen you will see a playing field on which there will be round dots of different colors. You will need to inspect everything carefully. Find two identical dots of the same color. Now connect them using the mouse with one line. Having done this, you will see how these points will disappear from the playing field. By making your moves, you will completely clear the field of dots and then move on to the next level of the game.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: 1 2 3 4 Player Tank Game 2D
games.description: Are you ready for the legendary tank battles? Gather all your friends and start the tank war.All tanks take their positions and the endless battle begins. The tank that destroys the most of your friends tanks wins. In this fun tank battle game, compete with your friends and be the one who destroys the most tanks. Be careful, its not about being fast, but being smart that will lead you to victory.
games.instructions: Green Tank Use WASD to move and Q to fire Blue Tank Use Arrow Keys to move and P to fire Black Tank Use UHJK to move and M to fire Red Tank Use FCVB to move and N to fire

games.name: Weapon Survivor
games.description: Welcome to Weapon Survivor, a wonderful action game filled with gunfire. In this exciting arcade game, you&amp;rsquo;ll play as a brave survivor. You are trapped in a battlefield full of enemies. Your only way out is to shoot and merge various weapons to enhance your combat abilities. Use your weapons to create rabid bulletstorms to shoot enemies.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Stickman Collect Run
games.description: Stickman Collect Run is an exciting parkour adventure where you dash, jump, and slide through a colorful world. Control a stickman as he runs through a vibrant, action-packed platform. Your goal is to keep running, collect as many other colored people as you can, and arrive at the finish line.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Chill Math Averaging
games.description: In this game, a winter image is hidden beneath averaging expression tiles. Players must drag and drop the correct number bauble onto the matching tiles to solve the expressions. As each expression is solved, the winter image gradually gets revealed. The goal is to uncover the entire image by completing all the math problems correctly.
games.instructions: Use a mouse or touchpad to drag and drop the correct number bauble onto the matching tiles to solve the expressions

games.name: Poppy Playtime Space Fly
games.description: Poppy Playtime Space Fly takes horror fun to the skies. Control Huggy Wuggy in a thrilling space adventure. Dodge asteroids and enemy attacks while collecting power-ups. Enjoy eerie yet exciting gameplay with smooth flying mechanics. Experience creepy sound effects and a dark cosmic atmosphere. Challenge yourself with increasing difficulty as you explore space. Perfect for fans of horror-themed arcade games. Compete for high scores and unlock new challenges. Play online without downloads. Can you survive Huggy Wuggy&amp;rsquo;s space escape?
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Count Master Match Color Run
games.description: Count Master: Match Color Run is a colorful running game where you lead a group of little characters in a color-matching race! In this exciting arcade challenge, collect characters of the same color to grow your team. Merge them for a bigger squad, aiming for the highest score. Avoid hammers, spikes, etc. Collect characters of the same color to expand your team.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Qolor Quiz Game
games.description: Test your knowledge and challenge yourself with this fun and engaging quiz game! Answer a variety of questions, use lifelines when youre stuck, and race against the timer to prove youre a true genius. With colorful visuals, exciting sounds, and rewarding gameplay, this quiz will keep you entertained for hours. Play now and see how many questions you can get right! Let me know if you want any tweaks!
games.instructions: Start Button To Start skip button to skip question hint button extra time button

games.name: Slime Arcade Run
games.description: Want to do a crazy parkour challenge with bouncy Slime? In Slime Arcade Run, you control a lively slime on a crazy running platform full of obstacles. Enter a colorful world that challenges your running abilities. Try to collect more Slime. Choosing to pass through a door with a positive number will also increase your number.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Block Mover   Unlock Your Brain
games.description: Relax Your Mind Between Rush Hours whether youre a kid or an adult. Engage Your Intellect and Unlock Your Brain with Wooden Board Puzzles Unblock Me gives you an immersion in a world where logic, flow, and simplicity come together.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Train Artillery Adventure
games.description: Welcome to Train Artillery Adventure, an exciting game combining shooting, merging, and upgrading! In this game, you control a powerful artillery train, traveling through various battle zones and defeating zombies. Control the artillery turret on your train, aim precisely, and fire powerful shots at the zombies.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Run Stickman Run
games.description: Run Stickman Run is an endless running game packed with speed and excitement. Dash through different environments while avoiding obstacles. Test your reflexes in fast-paced, action-packed gameplay. Jump, slide, and dodge to survive as long as possible. Enjoy smooth controls and dynamic animations. Compete for the highest score and challenge your friends. The difficulty increases the longer you run, making it more thrilling. Play online anytime and see how far you can go. Can you break your record?
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Farm of Words
games.description: Farm of Words is a fun and relaxing word game in a wordcross style format made for the smartest brains! This game is a cross between all the aspects of word games you love to make you totally addicted and entertained! Swipe the letters to find and guess the hidden words, build up your vocabulary, and have fun! Farm of Words starts as an easy word game and gets harder as you level up! Can you beat the game? Besides, you can use the gems you get to use the system&amp;rsquo;s hint feature to easily pass difficult levels.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Dark Sprint
games.description: Dark Sprint is a fast-paced, adrenaline-pumping runner set in a shadowy, mysterious world. Dash through eerie landscapes filled with traps, crumbling paths, and lurking dangers as you guide your character through the darkness. With precise timing and quick reflexes, avoid deadly obstacles and unlock new areas cloaked in secrets. Collect glowing orbs, power-ups, and hidden relics to boost your speed and score. The deeper you run, the darker and more thrilling it becomes. With stylish visuals, intense gameplay, and haunting soundscapes, Dark Sprint offers an unforgettable running experience. Can you outrun the darkness and survive the night?
games.instructions: use mouse or touch screen on mobile to play game

games.name: SpaceFrontier
games.description: Control the safe launch of the rocket. Rockets have multiple levels. Seize the opportunity to safely separate the rocket levels. Rockets can be upgraded, and the higher the level, the more grades there are. Rockets can reach other planets when they fly to a certain height. Come and try to see how high the rocket you control can fly.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: 2 Player BlockMiner Escape
games.description: Miners, run quickly to the minecart! The miners have jumped in and are escaping from the giant zombie. Never look back and help Steve and Alex. They need to escape the mine, but first they must reach the gold chest at the end. Help them get to the gold chest. The mine is very dangerous &amp;mdash; there are obstacles and spiders everywhere. Reach the gold chest safely!
games.instructions: Press W or the Up Arrow key to jump Playable on both mobile and PC Double jump available

games.name: WavyTrip
games.description: Control the plane through obstacles. There will be many obstacles during the flight of the aircraft, and grasp the strength and timing to make the aircraft safely through the obstacles. You can also get gold rewards during the flight, and gold can unlock other planes, come and play.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Fish Evolution 3d
games.description: Ready to have the most exciting evolution adventure in Fish Evolution 3D? This is not just another casual game. Its a fun running and collecting experience. Your fish evolves in real-time as you swim through a colorful 3D platform world! Start as a tiny fish and collect more fish to grow bigger, faster, and cooler. Avoid dangerous traps like a hook or through the lazy door.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Ninja brainrot Slice
games.description: Ninja Brainrot Slice is an endless arcade game that puts your ninja reflexes to the ultimate test! Instead of slicing fruit, you&amp;rsquo;ll slash through the crazy heads of your favorite Brainrot characters &amp;mdash; Tung Tung, Sahur, Crocodilo, and Tralala. Swipe fast, build combos, and climb the leaderboards as the heads fly across the screen. But be careful &amp;mdash; one wrong slice into a bomb and your run is over! Fast-paced, funny, and addictive &amp;mdash; Ninja Brainrot Slice turns chaos into a slicing challenge like no other.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Onet Mahjong Connect
games.description: Onet Mahjong Connect is an easy and fun puzzle game where players match identical tiles. The goal is to connect two matching tiles. Tiles can be linked if they can be joined using three or fewer straight lines. With many levels to enjoy, the game offers a relaxing and engaging experience &amp;mdash; perfect for taking a break and sharpening your mind!
games.instructions: Use a mouse or touchpad to play this game

games.name: Soldier Run Evolution
games.description: Soldier Run Evolution is a fun platform running game that includes soldier evolution and puzzle elements in one epic adventure. Lead your soldier through exciting levels, attack, and shoot enemies. Move your soldiers through an increasing number of doors, thus growing your ranks. Increase weapon power to unlock different stages of evolution.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: FrogTap
games.description: Adventure with animals. Take the time to help the animal jump from one platform to the platform above, Avoid touching the spikes above. During the game, you can earn diamonds, which are used to unlock new animals.Come and experience it.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Italian Brainrot Hunter
games.description: Grab your weapon and shoot all the incoming monsters! You need to reach the helicopter safely. Brainrot monsters are everywhere &amp;mdash; theyve invaded the city. Trallela is the strongest monster, and you must defeat it. Take it down and claim victory. Grab your gun and fire!
games.instructions: Use the WASD keys to move Shoot and defeat all incoming enemies Reach your helicopter safely Playable on both mobile and PC

games.name: TinyGameBox
games.description: A variety of puzzle games are gathered together, all of which are very fun and can exercise your reaction ability. Come and give it a try.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Italian Brainrot Candy
games.description: &amp;ldquo;Italian Brainrot Candy&amp;rdquo; is an electrifying game where your mission is to match identical blocks to earn extra time. Each time you match identical blocks, you earn a precious second, but beware: if time runs out, it&amp;rsquo;s game over! Challenge your reflexes and matching skills in this thrilling and addictive game, where every move counts to avoid imminent defeat.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Contagion Clash
games.description: Strategize your taps and unleash chain reactions in Microbes! The play area is swarming with microbes&amp;mdash;some can shoot, others can&amp;rsquo;t. Your goal is to touch the right microbes in the right order, triggering shots that wipe out all the non-shooters. Plan your moves carefully, because one wrong touch could break the chain! Think smart, tap wisely, and cleanse the petri dish in this infectious puzzle challenge!
games.instructions: Plan Think and Play

games.name: Piercing Skies
games.description: Dodge, jump, and survive under a sky of danger in Piercing Skies! Arrows rain down from above as you leap between three narrow platforms, timing each jump to avoid getting struck. Quick reflexes and sharp focus are your only defense in this fast-paced survival challenge. Every second you last adds to your score&amp;mdash;but one mistake, and its game over. Can you outlast the storm and master the art of survival beneath the piercing skies?
games.instructions: Move the block to not let the arrows hit it

games.name: WW2 Frontline Defense
games.description: WW2 Frontline Defense is an idle war strategy game set during World War II. Command machine gunners defending the frontline wall against endless enemy waves. With each wave, enemies grow stronger, faster, and harder to stop. Upgrade your tower, boost game speed, activate artillery strikes, and double your income with powerful bonuses. Build an impenetrable defense and hold the line for as long as possible. Key features: Fast-paced base defense during World War II Tower upgrades and income multipliers Free and premium bonuses (artillery, x2, speed boost) Cloud saves and leaderboards 14 supported languages Play instantly in your browser
games.instructions: Enemies attack in waves - hold the line Your tower shoots automatically Earn gold for each enemy killed Upgrade the tower use bonuses speed artillery x2 income Survive as long as you can and beat your score After defeat start over with stronger
